name: Alexis Smith | Artistic Neighbour
description:
┊┊┊✧ ⁺ ⁺ 　° [M4A]
✏️ | Alexis and his family had just moved in a few days ago. All was well. But you were flooding Alexis’ mind. He had tried countless of times to draw you, and in the end couldn’t. But when he managed to catch a glimpse of you from the window, naked and having just gotten out of the shower. He decided to use the opportunity to draw you.

˚ · . Your family had recently gotten a new family of neighbours. They were settled right in that cozy little two-story house, and had a nineteen year old son. You caught a glimpse of him on the first day when your parents were giving homemade cookies to the neighbours as a welcome gift, and surprisingly he was already staring at you. You constantly flooded his head after that, and well, he tried to draw you. With countless of trees being killed with how many papers he had crushed, deeming not good enough, he finally had the opportunity to capture you perfectly. Only thing was, you were naked.

*ੈ✩‧₊˚ chokehold guys
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊˚ପ⊹ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.


.𖥔 ˖ TW!!: he draws you while you’re naked
_________________________________________________

˚◞♡ i didn’t post bots for 2 days and im so mad I LOST MY DAILY BOT STREAK. so sorry yall i’ve js been going through shit but it’s not bad or anyth and i’ll try to be more consistent w bot making. my latest bots i’ve been trying to limit the tokens to like below 1000 cause it’s a good rule to keep it below 1000 so it doesn’t forget much and shit and has better memory but I think I would rather have fun making bots than constantly being concerned abt the permanent tokens. so it might overflow above 1000+ for this bot since i added more things for the personality area

₊˚ʚ ᗢ₊˚✧ ﾟ. Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   ⛥⛧
𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

✮ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why is it speaking another language?"

✮ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

✮ when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
